name: Elite Fleet Limousine Svc
recent_news: No M&A or notable news found; appears to be a home-based sole-proprietor limo operation registered to a Roswell residential address (110 Arbor Creek Way) owned by Veronica A. Scott per Fulton County tax records.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. 2-employee residential limo service flagged in source data as special-needs; no evidence of district contracts or school transportation. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Metro North Logistics LLC
recent_news: Registered as a women-owned LLC in Fairburn GA per Smart Girl Stories directory and BlackDirectory; listed in HigherGov federal awardee database (UEI R4L9SSZMQAC9). No M&A activity; appears active but micro-scale.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus contractor; described as special-needs/logistics but no evidence of yellow-bus fleet or district routes. Too small (2 employees, est. $167K revenue) for Summit tuck-in.

name: Newstar Limousine
recent_news: No web presence found; not located in Georgia DPS licensed limousine carrier list under this name. Registered to a residential address in Roswell, GA (1126 Thomas Dr).
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Sole-proprietor luxury/livery limo at residential address; no school district or SPED contracts identified. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Red Stone Mobility
recent_news: BBB profile opened Feb 2025; F rating (failed to respond to complaints), 1.0/5 stars across 7 reviews with customers questioning authenticity of vehicle listings. Operates as a wheelchair-accessible vehicle dealer, not a transportation operator.
fit_notes: NOT AN OPERATOR. BBB classifies as wheelchair-accessible vehicle dealer (car dealer category). F-rated with customer concerns about legitimacy. Exclude from Summit tuck-in universe.

name: SNS Andrew Express LLC
recent_news: Maintains thin marketing website (snsandrewexpress.com) describing generic 'professional and affordable transportation services across Georgia'; no service-line detail, founding date, or principals disclosed. Yelp profile exists. Distinct from FMCSA-registered Andrew Express LLC (USDOT 2207566).
fit_notes: No evidence of school-bus or SPED routes; vague generic transportation marketing. Micro-scale (2 employees) at Atlanta residential address. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.
